div.h1: Hash Table Resize State Machine (Linear Probing / Robin Hood)

h2.strong: Engineering Specification: Lock-Free Shadow Allocation & Atomic Rehash

ol.li: Detection: Monitor Load Factor ($\alpha > 0.85$) or Tombstone Pressure ($\beta > 0.10$).
Allocation: Parallel allocation of shadow arrays (Keys, Values, Metadata).
Atomic Swap: Pointer redirection via single CAS or atomic exchange.
Incremental Migration: Rehash occupied slots from stale segment to new primary.
Deallocation: Deferred reclamation of stale memory regions.

ul.li: EMPTY (0xFF): High bit set, sentinel for fast scan.
DELETED (0xFE): High bit set, distinct from EMPTY.
OCCUPIED (0x00-0x7F): Bits 0-6 = H2 (Top 7 bits of hash).

div.p: Between Save_Old and Install_New, the table must be locked or use a Hazard Pointer for concurrent readers to prevent Use-After-Free.
